name: Mentor-memory interest-context change reverts silently on failure
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-04] on mutation failure the optimistic chip snaps back with no toast/alert/escalation (write-path silent recovery). Fix: surface actionable error on catch.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the mentor-memory interest context row catches onContextChange failure only to restore the previous chip state, with no toast, alert, inline error, or retry affordance. Variant: single variant, any rejected interest-context mutation after the optimistic selection. Regression test: add/update coverage around apps/mobile/src/components/mentor-memory-sections.tsx so a rejected onContextChange fails without the fix and passes only when the user receives actionable error feedback while the optimistic rollback still occurs.
